info.description: WhatsApp Multi-Session API powered by whatsmeow
info.title: wzap API

get.description: Returns the health status of the API and its dependencies
Exposes Prometheus metrics for monitoring wzap instance
Returns all sessions. Token is never included in list responses.

post.description: Creates a new session with an auto-generated or custom token. Returns the full session object including the token.

get.description: Returns the session identified by :sessionId (name or id). Token is not included.

put.description: Updates session fields (name, proxy, settings). Only provided fields are changed.

delete.description: Disconnects and permanently deletes the session and its device from the store

post.description: Archives a chat identified by JID, moving it out of the main chat list
Permanently deletes a chat (including media)
Mutes notifications for a chat identified by JID
Pins a chat to the top of the chat list
Marks specific messages in a chat as read
Removes a chat from the archived list
Removes mute from a chat
Removes a chat from the pinned position at the top of the chat list
Marks a chat as unread. Note: WhatsApp protocol does not support this operation directly.
Creates a new WhatsApp Community (a group of groups) with a name and optional description
Adds one or more subgroups (by JID) as participants to an existing community
Removes one or more subgroups (by JID) from an existing community
Connects a WhatsApp session. Returns status CONNECTED, PAIRING (QR required), or CONNECTING.

get.description: Returns all contacts from the WhatsApp session

post.description: Fetches the profile picture URL and picture ID for the given WhatsApp JID
Blocks a WhatsApp contact by JID, preventing them from sending messages

get.description: Returns the full list of JIDs currently blocked by the session

post.description: Checks if phone numbers are registered on WhatsApp
Fetches detailed user info (status, profile picture, devices) for one or more WhatsApp JIDs
Subscribes to presence updates for a contact (online/offline/typing)

get.description: Retrieves the current session's WhatsApp privacy settings (last-seen, profile photo, status visibility)

post.description: Updates a privacy setting (groupadd, last, status, profile, readreceipts, online, calladd)
Updates the session account's WhatsApp profile picture with a base64-encoded image
Updates the session's WhatsApp "About" status message
Unblocks a previously blocked WhatsApp contact by JID
Disconnects the active WhatsApp session without removing the device (can reconnect later)

get.description: Returns all WhatsApp groups the session is part of

post.description: Sets whether only admins can send messages in the group
Creates a new WhatsApp group with the given participants
Updates the description of the specified WhatsApp group
Sets the disappearing messages timer for a group (in seconds: 0, 86400, 604800, 7776000)
Get detailed information about a group by JID
Previews a group's info using an invite code without joining
post.summary: Get group info from invite link

post.description: Gets the invite link for a WhatsApp group, optionally resetting it
Joins a group using an invite code
Activates or deactivates the admin approval system for new members
Leaves a specified WhatsApp group
Sets whether only admins can edit group info
Updates the name of the specified WhatsApp group
Add, remove, promote or demote participants in a group
Updates the profile picture of the specified WhatsApp group
Removes the current group profile photo
Get the list of participants that requested to join the group
Approves or rejects participants that requested to join the group
Applies a label to an entire chat conversation
Edits an existing label's name, color, or marks it as deleted
Applies a label to a specific message within a chat
Logs out the WhatsApp device (requires re-scan), but keeps the session record

get.description: Returns a presigned S3 URL for a previously stored media message
Returns paginated message history for the session

post.description: Sends a base64-encoded audio file as a voice note (PTT)
Sends a message with interactive buttons
Sends a vCard contact message via WhatsApp to the specified recipient
Revokes a previously sent message for all recipients (unsend)
Sends a base64-encoded file as a document. Use filename to set the display name.
Edits a previously sent message by mid, replacing its text content
Forwards an existing message to another chat or group
Sends a base64-encoded image to a WhatsApp JID with optional caption
Sends a hyperlink with optional title and description as a rich preview message
Sends a message with interactive list sections
Sends a GPS location message with optional name and address to the specified recipient
Sends a poll with multiple choice options. selectableCount controls how many options a recipient may choose (0 = unlimited)
Sends a chat presence indicator. Accepted values for presence: typing, recording, paused
Adds an emoji reaction to a message. Pass an empty string for reaction to remove an existing one.
Sends a read receipt for a specific message (removes unread indicator)
Sends an image to WhatsApp Stories/Status
Sends a text message to WhatsApp Stories/Status
Sends a video to WhatsApp Stories/Status
Sends a base64-encoded sticker image (WebP) to the specified recipient
Sends a plain text message to a WhatsApp JID (user or group)
Sends a base64-encoded video to a WhatsApp JID with optional caption
Creates a new WhatsApp Newsletter (channel) with optional description and profile picture
Retrieves metadata about a newsletter by its JID
Retrieves newsletter metadata from an invite code without subscribing
post.summary: Get newsletter info from invite code

get.description: Returns all newsletters the current session is subscribed to

post.description: Fetches messages from a newsletter; supports pagination via before_id cursor and count
Toggles mute status for a newsletter
Sends a reaction to a newsletter message
Subscribes the current session to a newsletter identified by its JID
Unfollows a newsletter
Marks newsletter messages as viewed by server IDs
Generates a pairing code for linking without QR scan. Call /connect first.

get.description: Returns the WhatsApp profile info for this session (push name, picture, bio). Requires an active connection.

post.description: Updates the session's WhatsApp profile display name (push name)

get.description: Returns the current QR code string and a base64 PNG image. Call /connect first, then poll this endpoint until a code is available.

post.description: Disconnects and reconnects the session
Disconnects and reconnects the session without losing state

get.description: Returns detailed connection status (connected, loggedIn, JID)

post.description: Removes a label from a chat conversation
Removes a label from a specific message

get.description: Returns all webhooks for the session

post.description: Registers a new webhook for the session

put.description: Updates webhook fields (URL, secret, events, enabled, natsEnabled). Only provided fields are changed.

delete.description: Removes a webhook from the session

Authorization.description: Session or admin token (without Bearer prefix)
Authorization.name: Authorization
